notes: 5G Toolbox, Deep Learning Toolbox, and Parallel Computing Toolbox are installed in MATLAB R2025b.
6G Exploration Library signpost was downloaded from the official MathWorks File Exchange page, but the add-on payload still needs MATLAB Add-On Installer/login to install.
MATLAB GPU works after enabling parallel.gpu.enableCUDAForwardCompatibility(true) for RTX 5060 compute capability 12.0.
PyTorch CUDA is available in the project virtual environment.
